findings.evidence: In the second paragraph of the PDF, the email address ('shirley.liggins@deq.nc.gov') and the web address are styled as blue, underlined text indicating hyperlinks. In the HTML, they are rendered as plain black text without these visual cues.

findings.description: Loss of underline formatting on emphasized text.
findings.evidence: In the third paragraph, the date 'October 1, 2025' is bold and underlined in the PDF, but it is only bold in the HTML.
The document identifier text at the very bottom of the page is left-aligned in the PDF but right-aligned in the HTML.
